items.name_en: C: Luggage Smile Bag▶
items.name_cn:
C: Luggage Smile Bag▶
️🔗Classic, timeless, top version, fully upgraded🔻
❤️A popular old model that many have loved for years and is still loved this year
❤️Solid exterior, energetic spirit, paired with vintage silver metal, handsome and proud
❤️Perfect silhouette, combining a wide top and narrow bottom structure
❤️Meets office needs and creates a casual charm, versatile style (with packaging)
Model: 189793 Calfskin/Camel
Dimensions: 27-25-13

items.name_en: CELIN_E 2026🆕|TEEN VICTOIRE Small Woven Bag
items.name_cn:
CELIN_E 2026🆕|TEEN VICTOIRE Small Woven Bag
CELINE has finally released a bag that can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody 👏
Celine SU25 New Style - Victoire
Victoire means victory and triumph ✌
The long-awaited chain Triumph bag, a favorite among many celebrities~
Made of premium natural grained calfskin
The small size is more playful and cute
Premium grain and soft touch
Full steel chain, featuring a triangular cut for 100% comfort, just like jewelry craftsmanship, super shiny ✨
Sheepskin lining, gold hardware, crossbody and shoulder carry, full steel TRIOMPHE clasp closure, 2 main compartments, 1 interior flat pocket, 1 interior center zip pocket, full steel metal slider chain, min length 26cm and max length 47cm
Dimensions: 23.5 X 14 X 8 cm
Style No.: 116593
